Title: Deprecating the cost center integration on the enterprise People page
EnhancedContent:
We are deprecating the cost center integration on the enterprise People page and in the People/Licensing CSV export.

When the cost center integration was originally shipped in 2023, cost center data was only accessible via the API. Since then, we’ve introduced a dedicated [cost center management page](https://docs.github.com/enterprise-cloud@latest/billing/using-the-new-billing-platform/about-the-new-billing-platform-for-enterprises) in Billing, making the People page integration redundant.

The following features are being removed from the enterprise People page:

- Cost center filter in the member filter bar
- Cost center status in member list details
- Cost center error warning banner
- Cost center section in the person detail sidebar
- Cost center column in the Licensing CSV export

To manage and view cost center assignments, visit the Cost centers page under your enterprise billing settings.

Join the discussion within [GitHub Community](https://github.com/orgs/community/discussions/categories/announcements).
